displayName: Institute for the Study of War
text: ASSESSMENT (May 9): IDF strike intensity in Lebanon May 9 — 85+ Hezbollah targets in 24 hours, 39 confirmed killed — represents shift from 'managed deterrence' to active interdiction. Pattern matches IDF preparation for potential expanded ground operations even as Lebanon-Israel talks set for Washington May 14-15.
verificationNote: ISW daily Iran Update Special Report May 9 confirmed by their X feed.

text: WSJ EXCLUSIVE: Israel built and defended secret base in Iraq's western desert to support Iran air campaign — including SAR teams for downed pilots. Earlier Israeli airstrikes (March 2026) killed 1 Iraqi soldier when forces approached after shepherd reported helicopter activity. Iraq UN complaint had blamed US, which had denied involvement.
verificationNote: Confirmed by WSJ original reporting; cross-confirmed by Breitbart, US News.

text: MISGAV AM STRIKE: Hezbollah explosive drone hit IDF reservists at Misgav Am, northern Israel — 1 seriously wounded, 2 moderately. Second drone struck Shlomi helicopter pad. Both used fiber-optic guidance to evade Israeli air defenses. Confirmed Hezbollah strike inside Israeli territory just 5 days before May 14 Washington talks.
verificationNote: Jerusalem Post + Hezbollah claim of responsibility verified by AFP.

text: IRAN RESPONSE TRACKING (May 10): Iran formally delivered response to US 14-point peace proposal via Pakistani mediator. Key conditions: no nuclear weapon, halt enrichment 12 years, maritime security in Hormuz. FM spokesman Baghaei: 'no response to deadlines or ultimatums.' IRGC simultaneously declared missiles 'locked on American targets' — classic Tehran two-track signaling.
verificationNote: Al Jazeera, CBS News, Times of Israel confirmed Iran response details. IRGC statements via Press TV.

text: DAILY BRIEF (May 10): Netanyahu 60 Minutes interview confirms Israel-US alignment on physically removing Iran's enriched uranium stockpile. Quotes Trump: 'I want to go in there and I think it can be done physically.' Strongest signal yet that ceasefire framework does NOT include uranium-in-place. Iran's Hormuz blockade leverage cuts both ways now.
verificationNote: FDD Overnight Brief; Netanyahu quotes verified by The National and CBS preview.

text: HORMUZ STATUS (May 10): One tanker successfully crossed Strait — first transit in days. Project Freedom paused since May 6. ~2,000 ships stranded; 22,500 mariners trapped. UK announces destroyer for separate UK-France-led mission, distinct from US deployment. Qatar PM warns Iran against using Hormuz 'as pressure card.' War-risk premiums still 1% (8x pre-war).
verificationNote: CNBC, Al Jazeera Day 72 liveblog, S&P Global all confirmed shipping/maritime details.

text: RIAL COLLAPSE: Iranian rial hits new all-time low 1,799,000 IRR/USD on open market — depreciated 63% over 6 months. Iran inflation tops 100% (vs IMF April forecast of 69%). Bread/cereals +140% YoY, oils/fats +219%, dairy +117%. Minimum wage now equivalent to ~$92/month after 60% raise.
verificationNote: Bonbast / AlanChand market data; Al Jazeera food inflation reporting; Wikipedia Iranian economic crisis.
